coverageNote: This curated layer contains reviewed public artifacts selected for a documented relationship to a directive. It is selective, not comprehensive or live. Inclusion documents a source relationship; it does not establish implementation status, completion, compliance, or performance. Omission is not evidence that no implementation activity or public record exists.

evidence.title: Transit Executive Order N-7-26 Resource Material (7/15/2026)

accessibility.note: PDF metadata reports a tagged document; this record does not make an accessibility conformance claim.

evidence.editorialSummary: The Commission presents proposed changes to the draft 2026 Solutions for Congested Corridors Program and Local Partnership Competitive Program guidelines pursuant to Order 5 of Executive Order N-7-26.

locations: Page 1: Reference Instructions and SCCP Part IV, Section 17.2.2
Page 2: Reference Instructions; LPP-C Part II, Section 6B; and Part IV, Section 14.1

limitations: This record covers only proposed SCCP and LPP-C changes associated with Section 5's state-guideline clause. It does not cover ATP, TIRCP, other programs, or Caltrans's federal-funding-identification clause, and it does not establish adoption, completion, compliance, or agency performance.

The artifact date is a scheduled-event date later than the Atlas review date. When reviewed on July 13, 2026, the Commission listed the July 15 workshop as upcoming and had not posted a recording or post-workshop outcome.
The artifact marks proposed additions with bold red styling, so a text-only extraction does not fully preserve that distinction.
